task_completion.description: Navigate to the SpamAssassin or Spam and Virus Delivery settings for the correct domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Virtualmin web interface is open, 'greenfield.test' is selected in the domain dropdown/sidebar, and the 'Spam and Virus Delivery' or 'SpamAssassin Mail Filter' configuration page is visible.

task_completion.description: Set the spam classification score threshold to 4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for 'Hits required before message is considered spam' (or equivalent classification threshold) is set to the number 4.
The input field for 'Delete spam if score is above' (or equivalent auto-deletion threshold) is set to the number 10.

task_completion.description: Configure identified spam to be delivered to the user's spam/junk folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The radio button or dropdown for spam destination/action is set to 'Deliver to user's spam folder', 'Write to standard spamdir', or equivalent option that routes to the junk folder.

task_completion.description: Add the specified trusted partner and alerting system to the whitelist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text area for 'Allowed email addresses' (Whitelist) contains exactly '*@trustedpartner.org' and 'admin@important-alerts.net'.

task_completion.description: Add the specified known spammer and bulk mail sender to the blacklist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text area for 'Denied email addresses' (Blacklist) contains exactly '*@known-spammer.example' and 'marketing@bulkmail.example'.

task_completion.description: Save and apply the SpamAssassin configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, banner, or visual confirmation indicating that the SpamAssassin or Spam and Virus Delivery settings have been successfully saved/applied for greenfield.test.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Virtualmin web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Virtualmin GUI, rather than terminal commands editing configuration files like local.cf directly.

integrity.description: Verify the settings are being applied specifically to the greenfield.test domain.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Virtualmin domain selector (usually in the left sidebar or top menu) must show 'greenfield.test' as the active virtual server during the configuration process.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Values should be typed into the appropriate Virtualmin form inputs, text areas, and radio buttons, not just written into a text editor or a generic terminal echo command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target domain: greenfield.test. Required classification score: 4. Auto-deletion score: 10. Whitelist entries: *@trustedpartner.org and admin@important-alerts.net. Blacklist entries: *@known-spammer.example and marketing@bulkmail.example. All domains and addresses are synthetic but use valid SpamAssassin syntax.
